properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Allowed origins for CORS (comma-separated list of URLs).

properties.name: cors.allow-credentials
properties.description: Whether credentials (like cookies or HTTP authentication) are supported for cross-origin requests.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing and validating JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.
